text:
There was once a woman who could turn anything she touched into whatever she wanted it to be. This wasn’t just a talent—it was a power. Imagine turning a barren garden into a paradise; or inventing a new fashion trend overnight?

One day, while shopping at the local market, she found herself eyeing a duster. The kind, white fabric felt cozy in her hands. In an instant, it morphed into a fluffy, elegant snowball. She laughed. Snow wasn’t really her style, but it felt right. It danced through the air before landing gently on her shoulder. When she brushed it off, her shirt was entirely covered in glittering snowflakes.

Everyone was stunned. The shopkeeper clutched his throat, unable to speak. Customers watched, mouths agape. The transformed duster disappeared in a puff of icy breath.

The woman smiled triumphantly. She thought of how absurd and delightful it was. She decided to turn the duster into a cloak
